caption: The video features a presentation at EuroPython 2018 in Edinburgh, focusing on the topic of "Passing Data Downstream" using xcom in Python. The presenter, standing behind a podium with a microphone, is explaining how data can be passed across operators downstream within a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) in an Airflow environment. The slide displayed includes Python code snippets demonstrating the creation of push and pull functions, as well as the definition of operators for these tasks. The presenter uses hand gestures to emphasize points while discussing the utility of this method for holding state data, such as database index IDs. The setting appears to be a professional conference room, and the audience is likely composed of developers or data scientists interested in Python and data processing workflows.
